best_edges.action: Protect and use as benchmark for any expansion test.
best_edges.evidence: pullback_long is the largest contributor: 31 trades, $2419.4 PnL, $252.9/hour, 100% win rate, no slow >=12h trades, worst MAE -403.2. It is broad enough to be real but still has meaningful heat.

best_edges.action: Protect from broad VWAP-extension or setup-quality pruning.
best_edges.evidence: 29 trades, $1077.4 PnL, $208.9/hour, median hold 3.0 minutes, average MAE only -57.8, worst MAE -335.75. Extended-VWAP winners show 18 trades and $1051.9, so blunt extension caps would damage the edge.

best_edges.action: Expand only with structure-confirmed admission tests; preserve convex target behavior.
best_edges.evidence: 5 trades, $987.0 PnL, $234.7/hour, median TP 12.0, median MFE 150.5, no slow trades, worst MAE -357.0. Prior charm-wall geometry and TP-shape experiments were accepted and materially improved objective from weak branches.

best_edges.action: Protect baseline and study as companion-split candidate rather than direct tightening.
best_edges.evidence: 20 trades, $1315.3 PnL, $170.1/hour, no slow trades, 100% win rate. Hidden signature shows blocking 1DTE would retain only 82.5% PnL and does not solve worst MAE, so it is an edge, not a liability.

best_edges.action: Retain but isolate with explicit tail containment metrics.
best_edges.evidence: Only 2 trades but $640.5 PnL and $290.3/hour; it also owns worst MAE -655.2 and average MAE -333.7. The worst trade made $546 after 120 minutes, so the edge is profitable but tail-heavy and path-dependent.

best_edges.action: Maintain strict confirmation; only test realization shape.
best_edges.evidence: 10 trades, $723.0 PnL, $187.7/hour, worst MAE -214.2, no slow trades. Current strict option-map and order-book gates appear to keep risk contained.

market_regime_read: The leader family is a short-sample, high-win-rate, take-profit-only SPX500 long scalper over about 12.3 calendar days. Realized losses and slow >=12h trades are absent, so risk-adjusted profit expansion should focus on PnL per exposure hour and hidden MAE rather than raw win rate. The real edge is distributed across VALID_0DTE pullback/charm/squeeze/wall profiles plus a meaningful 1DTE fallback. The main unresolved risk is not slow 12h drift but deep intratrade heat: worst MAE -655.2 from call_wall_acceptance_long, pullback worst -403.2, 1DTE worst -386.75, and charm-wall worst -357.0. Broad filters are dangerous because protected fast winners total $4818.1 and extended-VWAP winners total $1051.9; profit expansion should use isolated profile or router-split experiments, not global pruning.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Separate 1DTE pullback/reclaim behavior from existing 1DTE breakout behavior when 0DTE is unavailable.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: May be unreachable under current trigger logic or cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte trades without adding net PnL.
new_strategy_ideas.name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: VALID_1DTE_ONLY entries with ES pullback/reclaim state, retained breakout_long_1dte attribution, combined 1DTE MAE and PnL.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than clean breakout continuation.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL >= $1315, 1DTE average/worst MAE flat or better than -124.6/-386.75, breakout_long_1dte retained PnL explicitly measured, total risk-adjusted score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Use path behavior to separate rare call-wall convex recoveries from dangerous non-realization tails.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Can overfit a two-trade call-wall sample and cut the largest winner unless protected fast winners and out-of-sample days are validated.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Call-Wall Convex Recovery Monitor
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Intratrade MFE/MAE timing, half-TP timing, early favorable progress, call-wall profile attribution, protected fast-winner UTCs.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: call_wall_acceptance_long enters with wide selected target or extended ES-VWAP and fails to convert early favorable movement into sustained continuation.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Reduce call-wall worst MAE below -655.2 while retaining >=70% call-wall PnL, total net profit >=98% of leader, PnL/hour flat or better, and no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Catch pullback/charm-pin heat that is visible only after entry via early progress failure.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: May block delayed but profitable recoveries unless tested against protected fast winners and extended-VWAP winners.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Early Progress Heat Classifier
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Intratrade first-profit timing, half-TP timing, path MFE before MAE, profile attribution, protected winner list.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: pullback_long or charm_pin_pullback_long entry fails to print meaningful early positive progress before adverse expansion.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Worst MAE improves toward <= -513.4 and preferably <= -403 while retaining >=90% affected-profile PnL, >=95% protected fast winners, total score flat or better.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: Config-only discovery of whether inactive pin-avoid logic can absorb dangerous charm/pin states.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Dormant activation may be unreachable, cannibalize existing charm_pin_pullback_long/charm_wall_breakaway_long winners, or add no standalone PnL.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Dormant Pin-Avoid Router Attribution Probe
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Standalone dormant profile PnL, cannibalization versus charm_pin_pullback_long and charm_wall_breakaway_long, protected fast-winner retention.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: VALID_0DTE pin/charm context where active charm-pin or charm-wall profiles show high MAE or failed extended-VWAP rejection geometry.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Activated dormant profile has positive standalone PnL or reduces combined charm/pin/wall worst MAE, total net profit >=98% of leader, protected fast-winner retention >=95%, no slow trades.

new_strategy_ideas.edge: State-specific fallback quality for no-0DTE stale/expired routing.
new_strategy_ideas.failure_mode: Tiny sample can overfit; stricter stale breakout quality may remove positive fallback insurance or underpay the single clean EXPIRED_0DTE winner.
new_strategy_ideas.name: Stale No-0DTE Breakout Quality Box
new_strategy_ideas.required_data: Option data state, stale versus expired attribution, no-0DTE profile PnL/hour, fallback worst MAE, VALID_0DTE retention.
new_strategy_ideas.trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE routes to breakout_long_no_0dte and trade relies on ES continuation without valid 0DTE option confirmation.
new_strategy_ideas.validation_metric: Fallback PnL/hour improves versus $83.2 aggregate and $40.5 stale-breakout slice, fallback worst MAE flat or better, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count unchanged, total net profit >=98%.

next_experiments.config_bias: Isolated call_wall_acceptance_long branch. Prefer persistence, acceptance-quality, and target-realization shape. Do not disable the profile and do not use broad option-flow tightening.
next_experiments.goal: Improve risk-adjusted score by keeping the rare convex call-wall profit while reducing hidden heat or exposure time.
next_experiments.hypothesis: The call-wall edge is real but too tail-heavy: $640.5 on 2 trades and $290.3/hour, but worst MAE -655.2. Small realization/persistence constraints may preserve >=70% of its PnL while reducing average MAE or exposure drag.
next_experiments.name: Call-Wall Convex Retention And Heat Containment
next_experiments.primary_metric: Total risk-adjusted score; call_wall_acceptance_long PnL retention >=70%; total net profit >=98%; worst MAE or average MAE/exposure improves; slow_12h remains 0.
next_experiments.risk: The worst tail is also the largest winner, so containment may suppress the most profitable trade without improving the kept portfolio tail.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep strict option-map and order-book confirmation. Study target realization or continuation shape only; avoid loosening admission gates and avoid TP compression unless total PnL improves.
next_experiments.goal: Increase squeeze_long contribution and PnL/hour without giving back its clean MAE profile.
next_experiments.hypothesis: squeeze_long has a contained worst MAE (-214.2) and positive contribution ($723), but PnL/hour trails pullback/charm-wall. Exit/realization shape may improve contribution without changing the clean admission edge.
next_experiments.name: Squeeze Clean Continuation Realization Probe
next_experiments.primary_metric: squeeze_long PnL and PnL/hour, total net profit >=98% of leader, squeeze worst MAE no worse than -225, total score flat or better.
next_experiments.risk: The profile has only 10 trades; changing target shape can underpay rare continuation winners.

next_experiments.config_bias: Preserve require-breakout and convex target philosophy. Test only wall-structure and wall-distance admission/sample-building; avoid broad exit compression.
next_experiments.goal: Grow a high-quality charm-wall edge without disturbing core pullback/charm-pin flow.
next_experiments.hypothesis: charm_wall_breakaway_long has strong convex profile stats ($987, $234.7/hour, worst MAE -357) and prior charm-wall geometry experiments were accepted. Slightly better structure-confirmed admission may add or improve trades while preserving the edge.
next_experiments.name: Charm-Wall Structure-Confirmed Expansion
next_experiments.primary_metric: charm_wall_breakaway_long PnL and PnL/hour >=225, total net profit >=98%, global worst MAE no worse than -655.2 and preferably <= -513.4, total score flat or better.
next_experiments.risk: Small sample overfit; tighter structure can remove rare convex winners, while looser structure can import tail risk.

next_experiments.config_bias: Keep breakout_long_1dte baseline thresholds stable. If legal, test one-dte companion routing as attribution; otherwise freeze direct 1DTE tuning.

next_experiments.hypothesis: VALID_1DTE_ONLY contributes $1315.3 over 20 trades with no slow trades, but direct filtering would remove a major edge. A companion pullback split may capture a different 1DTE state and improve combined risk-adjusted contribution.
next_experiments.name: 1DTE Companion Split Attribution
next_experiments.primary_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL, 1DTE average/worst MAE, breakout_long_1dte retained trades/PnL, total score.

next_experiments.config_bias: Use only narrow profile-aware research around the existing extended-VWAP rejection family. Avoid global ES-VWAP caps, setup-quality floors, RSI floors, or structure-score jumps.
next_experiments.goal: Reduce hidden MAE without sacrificing the extended-above-VWAP profit source.
next_experiments.hypothesis: All 24 bad-MAE rows are covered by the extended-VWAP near-miss family, but protected extended-VWAP winners contributed $1051.9. Boundary retests should focus on single-threshold near misses and protected-winner retention rather than broad pruning.

next_experiments.name: No-0DTE Data-State Efficiency Holdout
next_experiments.primary_metric: Fallback PnL/hour, fallback worst MAE, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count unchanged, total net profit >=98%, slow_12h = 0.

research_notes: Leaderboard has plateaued around run_044/run_050/run_055/run_059/run_060 with identical score 9940.28 and net profit $7532.8. Prior accepted improvements were profile-specific or benign upstream restorations, while broad upstream changes such as indicator-register-resolution=Second, ema-period=12, and adx-period=10 caused severe objective damage. For this profit-expansion cycle, prioritize isolated profile experiments with strict retention checks. The highest expected research value is call-wall containment, squeeze/charm-wall realization expansion, and 1DTE companion attribution. Avoid single-threshold global filters: the report found no useful candidate, and protected good-trade fingerprints are large.
risk_controls: Do not recommend global setup-quality floors; setup >=73.5 would block 82 trades and retain only 19.1% PnL despite removing the worst tail.
Require total net profit retention >=98% of leader for any risk-reducer or profile-specific test unless the objective score improves materially.
Require completed trade drop <=10% for config-only experiments, especially because current edge depends on broad throughput across 103 trades.
Protect fast winners: any entry filter must retain >=95% of the 64 protected entries or clearly compensate with major MAE improvement.
Protect extended-VWAP winners: avoid broad ES-VWAP caps because clean extended-above-VWAP entries contributed $1051.9.
Keep slow_12h trades at 0; any experiment that introduces slow trades should be rejected even if raw PnL rises.
Do not repeat rejected upstream timing/indicator experiments: indicator-register-resolution=Second, ema-period=12, and adx-period=10 materially hurt score, drawdown, and MAE.
For dormant concept activation, activate exactly one dormant profile per experiment through a full router-list replacement and measure standalone PnL plus cannibalization.
